No. and date be published in the same format as it has

been indicated then the font size of the Release Order No. 
and date should not exceed 8 point-size and it should be 
printed at the bottom of the advertisement.
v Deduction Applicable 1. 10% deduction will be applicable for Advertisement

SOCIETY FOR ADVANCED MANAGEMENT OF COMMUNICATION 
AND VALUE ADDED DISSEMINATION OF INFORMATION
vi Forwarding copies of the issue of the publication 
carrying the advertisement
A copy of the each of the issue of the 
publication/edition carrying the advertisement must be 
sent direct to the client department/organization and 
also to the Executive Director (SAMVAD) at the above￾mentioned address as has been indicated in the sender 
column under postal certificate within 7 days of the 
publication.
vii Rate Payable The rates are DAVP or DIPR applicable. At the time of any 
rate revision, department may be notified or informed 
immediately.
viii Bills Bills must be submitted within a period of one month 
from the date of publication of advertisement. In case of 
non-submission of bill within the stipulated period, bill 
of current date be issued i.e. date of submission of bill 
be mentioned in the bill.
1. In Case of Display advertisement 15% discount will 
be applicable by SAMVAD. 
2. In Case of Classified & Indicative Board & 
Corporations processing fee @ 2% (1% each from 
Concerned B&C and 1% from Media Houses).
ix In case of advertisement material found to be 
unsuitable for good re production
Please inform us immediately if the material released 
for advertisement is found unsuitable for good re￾production to enable timely replacement.
x Concurrent release of advertisement of same 
client department/ organization
The multiple advertisement (especially display advt.) 
release of the same client should not appear together 
on the same page and also in the same issue unless 
otherwise specified. In case of display advertisement. 
Further, Display advertisement, duly designed and 
released by the department should be fully reproduced 
without any reduction in size. No change in the 
advertisement content, language and format be done 
without prior concurrence of the M.D -Cum- CEO 
(SAMVAD).
xi Display Advertisement Display advertisement, duly designed and supplied by 
us, should be fully reproduced without any reduction in 
size. No change in the advertisement content and 
format be done without prior concurrence of the M.D -
Cum- CEO/Execitive Director (SAMVAD).
xii Date of Publication of the Advertisement Advertisement should be published on the dates 
specified in the release order/scheduled dates. If the 
scheduled date is missed then the advertisement be 
treated as cancelled.
xiii Return of Advertisement Material Only required when needed by billing team.
xiv Disputes Arbitration All disputes subject to the jurisdiction of Chandigarh. 
In case of dispute, the matter would be referred to the 
Financial Commissioner/Commissioner & Secretary to 
Govt. Information, Public Relations and Cultural Affairs 
Department, Haryana for arbitration.
xv GST GST as applicable

for MD -Cum- CEO (SAMVAD),
Haryana, Chandigarh
